input: Run quality metrics on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected quality metrics output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the quality metrics workflow

input: Apply quality metrics to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive quality metrics analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to quality metrics

input: Run quality metrics but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply quality metrics but requirements contradict each other
expected_behavior: Skill detects contradiction, flags with [OPEN] tag, proposes resolution
